title: NovaFlare
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''NovaFlare''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Tresk Ortola]], after spending several years as first officer of a rebel gunship, was promoted to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] and given command of the ''NovaFlare'' prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''
